announcements.message: Chasan stop is only available M-F 7am-5:30pm. [View RPI Shuttle Info](https://administration.rpi.edu/parking-transportation/rensselaer-shuttle)
Shuttles will not run or run with limited capacity until the weather improves
Due to snowy roads, expect delays on West route shuttles
No shuttles will run starting at 1pm today. We apologize for the inconvenience.
